Biography
This is Abdultamim “Ahadi” born in 1987. I have completed my high school at Faiz Mohmmad high school in Kapisa province of Afghanistan. 

In addition, I completed my bachelor degree from the department of Mathematics at Parwan University in 2010. 

In 2011, I obtained the membership of Academic Cadre of mathematics department of Al-beroni University.

 In 2013, I was awarded a scholarship from the Eurasian National University in Kazakhstan via general evaluation to complete my Post Graduate (PG) degree which at last I successfully completed the course in 2015.


Likewise, I was promoted to the post of Vice chancellor of student affairs at Albironi University in 2018. 

Hence, as I was interested in research studies, on 11/02/2021,  I came to India to complete my Ph.D; therefore, I started my next academic journey at Kerala University in the field of mathematics (theories of graphs).

Academic Remnants
I have been the author of six books and eight academic articles that are published in the national and international journals.
As the rapid developments in education and technology concern, humans have been closely connected via various mediums and devices which have made the distances very short or no distance at all. Therefor, I also aim to help people to get benefit from what I know concerning the mathematics  and would like to deliver my knowledge via my YouTube channel.
In fact, there are several youtube channels that might cover different topics regarding mathematics, but I believe that I will use a very clear and concise language, one which everyone will easily be able to comprehend and learn something. So I hope what I aim to start will first help me deliver the best of my knowledge and secondly help you beloved viewers learn and acquire your expected lessons in a more practical and clearer way. 
All in all, I hope my language is overall understandable and clear. If anytime you feel any gaps and confusion, please feel free to share it with me. I will be more than happy to act and change accordingly.

Warm regards
